rows.capability: Parent plan contract records the parent objective, child request boundaries, evidence requirements, and assembly policy before delegation.
rows.activationGate: PR0 metadata audit only; future execution remains behind an explicit harness rollout gate.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK supplies the agent and runner substrate; OpenMagi owns the first-party parent contract and activation control.

rows.notes: This row is harness metadata, not a generic core planner rewrite.

rows.capability: Child role registry declares allowed first-party role families while keeping domain role examples adapter-owned.
rows.activationGate: Registry is advisory metadata until a future harness gate attaches a runner.

roleExamples.notes: Research role example belongs to a research adapter recipe.
Coding role example belongs to a coding adapter recipe.
Backoffice role example belongs to a backoffice adapter recipe.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns the reusable Agent primitive; OpenMagi owns first-party role policy and adapters own domain examples.

rows.notes: The core harness requires a registry shape, not research, coding, or backoffice behavior.

rows.capability: Child tool grants define least-authority tool scopes for child requests and require grant receipts before any future dispatch.
rows.activationGate: Grant rows are metadata-only until tool authority is separately approved.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns tool primitives; OpenMagi owns grant receipts and control policy.

rows.notes: No tool is attached by this matrix.

rows.capability: Child context budget caps parent-to-child context projection and requires explicit summary, evidence, and omission boundaries.
rows.activationGate: Budget policy is enforced first as fixture metadata.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns session and memory substrate; OpenMagi owns projected context budgeting and privacy boundaries.

rows.notes: The budget forbids raw transcript dependence and keeps parent context projection explicit.

rows.capability: Child completion contract requires a structured result with status, evidence references, limitations, and requested parent action.
rows.activationGate: Completion shape is a fixture contract before child execution is attached.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns runner output and artifact substrate; OpenMagi owns the child completion envelope.

rows.notes: A child is complete only when structured evidence is present.

rows.capability: Runtime-issued child evidence envelope binds child outputs to signed-by-runtime evidence ids, receipts, and visibility metadata.
rows.activationGate: Envelope schema is metadata-only until a future runtime signing gate is approved.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns artifact and callback substrate; OpenMagi owns runtime evidence envelope semantics.

rows.notes: Parent synthesis must consume this envelope rather than child free text.

rows.capability: Raw child transcript rejection prevents parent context from depending on child message logs, private tool traces, or hidden reasoning.
rows.activationGate: Rejection rule is fixture-enforced before any parent context projection path is added.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns session substrate; OpenMagi owns transcript rejection and redacted projection policy.

rows.notes: Accepted evidence is structured and sanitized.

rows.capability: Parent accept/retry/reject verdict records whether each child envelope can be used, retried with bounded changes, or rejected.
rows.activationGate: Verdict rows remain offline verifier metadata until approval/control enables orchestration.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns evaluation and callback substrate; OpenMagi owns verifier verdict semantics.

rows.notes: The parent never treats child completion as acceptance without a verdict.

rows.capability: Bounded retry policy limits child retry count, retry reasons, and retry context expansion.
rows.activationGate: Retry policy is default-off metadata until future harness counters exist.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns runner substrate; OpenMagi owns retry counters and authority boundaries.

rows.notes: Retries require a prior reject or retry verdict and may not expand authority by default.

rows.capability: Final assembly may cite or synthesize only child evidence envelopes that received an accept verdict.
rows.activationGate: Assembly rule is enforced as metadata before final response integration is wired.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns artifact and evaluation substrate; OpenMagi owns accepted-evidence-only assembly.

rows.notes: Rejected and retry-pending child outputs are not source material.

rows.capability: Verifier chain selection maps parent plan risk and adapter family to ordered evidence, citation, safety, and projection checks.
rows.activationGate: Selection matrix is offline metadata until verifier bus integration is approved.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns evaluation and callback substrate; OpenMagi owns verifier chain policy.

rows.notes: Adapter families may request verifier chains, but the harness owns the first-party selection contract.

rows.capability: beforeCommit/projection gate validates accepted evidence, redaction, and parent verdicts before public or durable projection.
rows.activationGate: Projection gate is a documented contract only in PR0.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns callback and artifact substrate; OpenMagi owns beforeCommit projection policy.

rows.notes: The gate is named for future callback placement, not attached behavior.

rows.capability: Public projection redaction strips private child context, nonaccepted evidence, secrets, and internal receipts from public events.
rows.activationGate: Redaction matrix is documentation and fixture coverage only.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns artifact substrate; OpenMagi owns public projection redaction.

rows.notes: Receipts can exist privately without becoming public event payload.

rows.capability: Default-off authority flags enumerate orchestration, child dispatch, tool grant, memory write, workspace write, and public projection authority.
rows.activationGate: Every authority flag starts false and requires a later explicit rollout gate.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns reusable runner, tool, and memory primitives; OpenMagi owns authority flags and rollout gates.

rows.notes: This row is the PR0 safeguard against accidental runtime authority.

rows.capability: ADK primitive ownership records which substrate belongs to ADK and which orchestration semantics remain OpenMagi-owned.
rows.activationGate: Ownership row is documentation-only and cannot enable behavior.

primitiveOwnership.notes: ADK owns Agent, Runner, FunctionTool, LongRunningFunctionTool, callback, SessionService, MemoryService, ArtifactService, and Evaluation substrate. OpenMagi owns evidence envelopes, ledger/receipts, verifier verdicts, projection, approval/control, privacy/redaction, and rollout gates.

rows.notes: This row prevents the first-party harness from becoming a generic core meta-agent rewrite.
